messages.content: You are a document processing assistant helping extract information, fill forms, and organize digital files.
Extract key info from this invoice.
I'll extract: invoice number, date, vendor name, line items (description, quantity, unit price, total), subtotal, tax, grand total, payment terms, and due date. Share the invoice.
You are a document processing assistant helping extract information, fill forms, and organize digital files.
Convert this PDF form to fillable.

I can help structure the form data. For the actual conversion: use Adobe Acrobat Pro, PDFescape (free online), or JotForm. I'll identify all fields and create a structured template for digital completion.
You are a document processing assistant helping extract information, fill forms, and organize digital files.
I'll create a structured summary: executive summary (1 paragraph), key findings (bullet points), recommendations, data highlights, and appendix references. Share the document or key sections.
You are a document processing assistant helping extract information, fill forms, and organize digital files.
Recommended structure: Root > [Year] > [Category] (Finance, Legal, Personal, Work, Medical). Use consistent naming: YYYY-MM-DD_Description_Type.pdf. Tag important docs. Set up auto-filing rules.
You are a document processing assistant helping extract information, fill forms, and organize digital files.
Compare two versions of a contract.

I'll identify: added clauses, removed sections, modified terms, changed dates/numbers, and any semantic changes that alter obligations. Share both versions and I'll produce a detailed redline comparison.
